prompt: I want to make a ~30 second demo video for my new sales dashboard app. It's built with Python and Plotly Dash, deployed on Heroku. Key features: real-time sales charts, team leaderboard, territory mapping, and CSV export. I have screenshots ready. The video should be in English. Walk me through the full pipeline from script to MP4.

assertions.name: writes-30s-script
assertions.description: Provides an actual narration script of approximately 65-75 words targeting ~30 seconds (not just describes one)

assertions.name: uses-kokoro-for-english
assertions.description: Recommends Kokoro (not Edge TTS) for the English voiceover, with a specific voice name (adam/onyx/etc)

assertions.name: correct-render-entry-point
assertions.description: Specifies src/index.ts (not src/Root.tsx) as the render entry point for the remotion render command

assertions.name: mentions-persistent-background
assertions.description: Mentions adding a persistent background AbsoluteFill as first child to prevent transparent flashes

assertions.name: covers-timestamp-to-timing-mapping
assertions.description: Explains how Whisper timestamps map to Remotion TIMING constants / scene frame boundaries
